_comment: OpenSearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) policy for paper_chunks index.

policy.description: Research RAG — paper_chunks index lifecycle: hot → warm → cold

states.name: hot
states._comment: Active write phase — first 30 days after index creation or rollover

rollover._comment: Rollover when index exceeds 50 GB OR is 30 days old

states.name: warm
states._comment: Read-mostly phase — 30 to 180 days. Reduce replicas to cut cost.

replica_count._comment: Remove replicas — warm data is accessed infrequently

force_merge._comment: Force merge to single segment for read efficiency

states.name: cold
states._comment: Archive phase — 180+ days. Move to UltraWarm (S3-backed) storage. Read-only.

actions._comment: Block all writes to this index

ism_template._comment: Apply this policy to all paper_chunks-* indexes automatically
